fields.name: dateTime
fields.description:
date and time specified in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss format e.g. 2017-11-10T10:00:00
not supported for stopOvers object

fields.name: locationCode
fields.description: airport code from [IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx), e.g. CDG.

fields.name: lfiCode
fields.description: internal airport identifier used for private jets and helicopters e.g. IT87100

fields.name: name
fields.description: Place name e.g. Airport Name, Hotel Name etc.

fields.name: googlePlaceId
fields.description: Google place id only for google address e.g. ChIJL-DOWeBv5kcRfTbh97PimNc.

fields.name: uicCode
fields.description: UIC code defined by the worldwide railway organization e.g. 8600626
